modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Callers get disconnected when put on hold or transferred.

full_description_text: Callers are getting disconnected. This happens when they are put on hold or transferred. It also occurs when they select options in the main greeting. This is a problem with the VoIP system.
short_description: Callers get disconnected when put on hold or transferred.
description: Callers are getting disconnected. This happens when they are put on hold or transferred. It also occurs when they select options in the main greeting. This is a problem with the VoIP system.
